zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard II Tempest於大約1170年出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾時，他的父親Roger Tempest I27歲，母親Lady Alice Rilleston17歲。他和Elena de Tong至少有2個兒子。他去世於從1287年11月12日到1288年6月在英國藍卡爾布拉可維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard II Tempest于大约1170年出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾时，他的父亲Roger Tempest I27岁，母亲Lady Alice Rilleston17岁。他和Elena de Tong至少有2个儿子。他去世于从1287年11月12日到1288年6月在英国藍卡爾布拉可維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard II Tempest was born about 1170, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, his father, Roger Tempest I, was 27 and his mother, Lady Alice Rilleston, was 17. He had at least 2 sons with Elena de Tong. He died from 12 November 1287 to June 1288, in Bracewell, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard II Tempest est né environ 1170, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger Tempest I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Rilleston, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Elena de Tong. Il est décédé du 12 novembre 1287 au juin 1288, à Bracewell, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard II Tempest um 1170 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Tempest I 27 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Rilleston 17. Er hatte mit Elena de Tong mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb von 12. November 1287 bis Juni 1288 in Bracewell, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard II Tempest è nato il circa 1170 nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Tempest I, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Rilleston, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Elena de Tong. Morì da 12 novembre 1287 a giugno 1288, nel Bracewell, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard II Tempestが約1170年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで生まれた時，父Roger Tempest Iは27歳，母Lady Alice Rillestonは17歳であった。彼はElena de Tongとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼はから1287年11月12日まで1288年6月にイギリスランカシュアイアブレイセウエルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard II Tempest(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Tempest I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Rilleston(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Elena de Tong(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1287년 11월 12일부터 1288년 6월 까지 영국 랭카실르 브라스웰에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard II Tempest nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Tempest I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Rilleston, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Elena de Tong. Ele faleceu de 12 de novembro de 1287 a junho de 1288, em Bracewell, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard II Tempest родился около 1170 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Tempest I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Rilleston, 17. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Elena de Tong. Он умер с 12 ноября 1287 по июнь 1288 в местности бреисюелл, ланкашир, Англия.
